bugs.title: companion mode tool called on info query 2
bugs.description: Message 2 ('I'm near Praca do Comercio -- what's a good lunch spot around here?') triggered a toolCall with toolName 'create_itinerary_items'. The tool-level guardrail rejected the call (status: not_needed) so no items were created, but the AI should not have attempted the call at all on an informational query. The prompt discipline failed; only the tool-level safety net prevented mutation.
bugs.expected: No toolCall for create_itinerary_items on an informational lunch recommendation query
bugs.actual: toolCall fired with create_itinerary_items attempting to add 'Lunch at Pinoquio' as day 4 item
bugs.api_command: buf curl SendMessage with content 'I'm near Praca do Comercio -- what's a good lunch spot around here?' in CHAT_MODE_COMPANION

bugs.title: companion mode tool called on info query 6
bugs.description: Message 6 ('Recommend something fun to do tonight.') triggered a toolCall with toolName 'create_itinerary_items'. The tool-level guardrail rejected the call (status: not_needed) so no items were created, but the AI should not have attempted the call at all. This is the exact same trigger pattern as Run 5 N-01 msg5 -- the AI still conflates 'recommend' with 'add to plan'.
bugs.expected: No toolCall for create_itinerary_items on an informational recommendation query
bugs.actual: toolCall fired with create_itinerary_items attempting to add 'Fado Show in Alfama' as day 4 nightlife item
bugs.api_command: buf curl SendMessage with content 'Recommend something fun to do tonight.' in CHAT_MODE_COMPANION

ai_behavior_issues.issue: AI cannot answer weather questions -- msg1 response said 'I cannot access real-time weather information' despite web_search tool being available in companion mode. The AI should have attempted a web search.
ai_behavior_issues.context: Message 1: 'What's the weather like in Lisbon today?'

usefulness_evaluation.narrative: The companion mode guardrail partially works: 4 of 6 informational queries correctly avoided itinerary tool calls, and the tool-level safety net prevented actual mutations on the 2 that over-fired. However, the AI still attempts create_itinerary_items on food recommendation and nightlife recommendation queries (msgs 2 and 6), meaning prompt discipline alone is insufficient -- the tool-level guardrail is doing the heavy lifting. The itinerary was never mutated (N_BEFORE=12, N_AFTER=12), so the user experience is correct, but the architecture is relying on a fallback rather than primary prompt control. Responses were concise and phone-friendly. The AI failed to use web_search for the weather question.
